nasb.text: Nevertheless you shall not build the house, but your son who will be born to you, he will build the house for My name.’

esv.text: Nevertheless, you shall not build the house, but your son who shall be born to you shall build the house for my name.’

cnv.text: 然而你不要建造這殿，只有你親生的兒子，他必為我的名建造這殿。’

ccb.text: 但你不要建，要由你的亲生儿子为我建殿。’
